_comment: ml-intern user-config snippet for the ml-intern-mcp-toolkit. Point ml-intern at this file via $ML_INTERN_CLI_CONFIG (or copy to ~/.config/ml-intern/cli_agent_config.json). Required env: ML_INTERN_TOOLKIT_PATH (absolute path to the toolkit checkout). Optional env: EXPERIMENT_TRACKER_DB_PATH, ARXIV_DEEP_CACHE_DIR. See docs/ml_intern_integration.md for setup.
